content:
## Project Overview
Backend system for a multi-tenant application with OCR processing, inventory management, billing, attendance, analytics, and approval workflows.

## Completed Work
- **Fix #2**: Row-level locking on inventory balance reads (`steel_service.py`)
- **Fix #3**: Self-approval bypass in IP-2 conditional workflows (`approval_service.py`)
- **Fix #4**: Idempotency key enforcement on dispatch creation (`steel.py`)
- **Fix #5**: OCR queue backpressure/memory protection (`ocr_jobs.py`)
  - Line 292: `_cleanup_job_input(job)` in `_worker_loop()` permanent-failure path ✓
  - Line 146: `_cleanup_job_input(job)` in `_schedule_retry()` when queue full during retry ✓
  - Lines 333–336: `enqueue_job()` checks queue capacity before writing to disk ✓
- **Fix #6**: Attendance punch-in cross-midnight shift confusion (`attendance.py`)
- **Fix #7**: Billing webhook idempotency uses event_id hash only (`billing.py`)
- **Fix #8**: Tenant isolation enforcement on approval queue listing (`approval_service.py`)
- **Fix #9**: Invoice creation allows negative line totals (`steel.py`)
- **Fix #10**: Analytics cache key includes user_id but NOT role (`analytics.py`)

## Key Technical Decisions
- OCR queue fix involves backpressure and memory protection in `ocr_jobs.py`
- All three disk-leak paths in OCR jobs confirmed to have `_cleanup_job_input` calls in correct locations

## Relevant Files & Code
- `backend/ocr_jobs.py` — Fix #5 fully applied and verified
- `backend/security.py` — open tab
- `backend/ai/validators/correction_pipeline.py` — open tab
- `backend/ocr_utils.py` — open tab
- `backend/routers/ocr/_common.py` — open tab
- `backend/ai/pipelines/ocr_pipeline.py` — open tab
- `backend/steel_service.py` — Fix #2 applied
- `backend/approval_service.py` — Fix #3 and Fix #8 applied
- `backend/steel.py` — Fix #4 and Fix #9 applied
- `backend/attendance.py` — Fix #6 applied
- `backend/billing.py` — Fix #7 applied
- `backend/analytics.py` — Fix #10 applied

## Current Status
All 9 fixes (Fix #2 through Fix #10) are fully completed and verified. Todo list confirms all items marked Completed as of 6/27/2026.

## Pending Tasks
- None — all fixes complete.
